info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications GSMA Camara Project Carrier Billing
Global System for Mobile Communications Get a list of payments

params.name: page
params.description: Requested index to indicate the start of the resources to be provided in the response

params.name: perPage
params.description: Requested number of resources to be provided in response

params.name: paymentCreationDate.gte
params.description: Initial `paymentCreationDate` for running the query. It must follow RFC 3339 and must have time zone. Recommended format is yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ (i.e. which allows 2023-07-03T14:27:08.312+02:00 or 2023-07-03T12:27:08.312Z)

params.name: paymentCreationDate.lte
params.description: End `paymentCreationDate` for running the query. It must follow RFC 3339 and must have time zone. Recommended format is yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ (i.e. which allows 2023-07-03T14:27:08.312+02:00 or 2023-07-03T12:27:08.312Z)

params.name: order
params.description: Used to return the sorted results in descending (default) or ascending order, based on `paymentCreationDate` property

params.name: paymentStatus
params.description: List of payment status to be considered for the query

params.name: merchantIdentifier
params.description: Merchant identifier to filter the results

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of payments and their details based on some filtering criteria.
Regardless the payment criteria provided, response MUST be always limited to payments performed by the API client (i.e same oAuth credentials) triggering this request.
This is to guarantee no API client can check payments performed by other, therefore avoiding any legal or privacy topic.

When Access Token is issued for a given user phone number, the list of payments returned would be only the ones associated to that

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Get payment details

params.name: paymentId
params.description: Payment identifier that was obtained from the create payment operation

items.docs:
Retrieve payment details for a given payment.

When Access Token is issued for a given user phone number, the payment details would be returned in case the `paymentId` is associated to that user phone number and API client, otherwise `404 NOT_FOUND` will be returned. When Access Token is not associated to a user phone number, the payment details are returned in case the API client managed that payment.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Create a new Payment

items.docs: Create a new payment for subsequent charging to an end user. Carrier Billing Server will apply the charging according to business configuration for the end user.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Prepare (reserve) a payment

items.docs: Prepare a new payment procedure. Carrier Billing Server will apply the charging according to business configuration for the end user.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Validate a payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The payment identifier returned when the payment preparation was created.

items.docs: Validate a given payment with a code, identified by its paymentId. This process is applicable for 2-STEP, when optionally required by business case.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Confirm a payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The payment identifier returned when the payment preparation was created.

items.docs: Confirm a reservation of a given payment, identified by its paymentId.

info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications Cancel a payment

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The payment identifier returned when the payment preparation was created.

items.docs: Cancel a reservation of a given payment, identified by its paymentId.
